project.name: china-slot-game
project.description: Browser-based Chinese-themed slot machine game built with Phaser, plus server-side implementation examples for RNG, sessions, spin APIs, and database schema.

nodes.name: IMPLEMENTATION_CHECKLIST.md
nodes.summary: Phase-by-phase checklist for server setup, authentication, game logic, APIs, database integration, testing, deployment, and monitoring.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Explains the server example files, setup steps, API test commands, and production hardening work that remains.

nodes.name: SERVER_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
nodes.summary: Detailed implementation plan for moving the slot game to server-authoritative RNG, persistence, security, monitoring, and deployment.

nodes.name: database_schema.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL schema for players, sessions, spins, balance transactions, RTP tracking, indexes, and reporting views.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Declares the example server runtime, development scripts, and dependencies for Express, JWT, PostgreSQL, security, and testing.

nodes.name: OFL.txt
nodes.summary: Vollkorn font license terms covering redistribution, modification, and naming restrictions for bundled font assets.

nodes.name: README.txt
nodes.summary: Font package documentation describing the bundled Vollkorn font family files and usage metadata.

nodes.summary: Core slot-machine model and controller classes for reels, symbols, paylines, line highlighting, win calculation display, player state, and spin controls.

nodes.summary: Large 3x5 slot configuration defining symbols, reels, paylines, payouts, sprites, fonts, sounds, and layout behavior for the Phaser scene.

nodes.summary: Class supporting visual animation behavior inside the 3x5 slot configuration.

nodes.name: client_integration.js
nodes.summary: Example browser client adapter for session initialization, authenticated spin requests, balance refreshes, and resilient fallback behavior against a slot backend API.

nodes.name: ServerClient
nodes.summary: Class for the browser-to-server integration example, handling API calls and fallback behavior.

nodes.name: server.js
nodes.summary: Example Express slot backend with RNG, session storage, balance checks, authentication middleware, spin endpoint logic, and basic rate limiting.

nodes.name: ServerRNG
nodes.summary: Class in the example backend that supports request authentication, random number generation, payout calculation, or spin API handling.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Browser entry point that loads Phaser, runtime configuration, slot configuration, utility classes, UI helpers, state machine code, and the main slot game scene.

nodes.name: slotGame.js
nodes.summary: Main Phaser scene that preloads assets, creates the slot UI, initializes controllers, handles reel spinning, and coordinates wins, free games, jackpot behavior, and backend spin results.

nodes.name: state_machine.js
nodes.summary: Spin state machine implementation covering pre-spin validation, manual and auto spins, free spins, cascade/endless variants, win/lose states, and spin button behavior.

edges.description: Popup handlers use popup controller utilities from mkutils.
Slot domain classes use shared event and tween helper abstractions.
Client integration example targets the Express API shape in server.js.
The example server is intended to replace memory maps with the provided PostgreSQL schema.
package.json defines scripts and dependencies for the example Express server.
Server documentation describes the server implementation path.
Server documentation describes client/server integration work.
Server documentation describes the server implementation path.
Server documentation describes client/server integration work.
Server documentation describes the server implementation path.
Server documentation describes client/server integration work.
Font README and license document the bundled Vollkorn font assets.

layers.name: Browser Shell
layers.description: The HTML entry point that loads the browser runtime and wires together the slot game scripts.

layers.name: Game Runtime
layers.description: Client-side Phaser game code, slot configuration, state machine logic, UI utilities, and runtime controllers.

layers.name: Server Examples
layers.description: Example backend, database schema, package configuration, and client integration code for authoritative slot sessions and spins.

layers.name: Server Documentation
layers.description: Server-side planning and implementation documentation that explains the example API, database schema, and integration path.

layers.name: Asset Licenses
layers.description: Bundled font licensing and asset documentation used by the slot game presentation layer.

tour.title: Start at the Browser Entry Point
tour.description: Begin with the HTML shell that loads Phaser and the ordered game scripts used by the browser slot experience.

tour.title: Understand Runtime Composition
tour.description: Trace how the main Phaser scene loads assets, creates controllers, and coordinates reel spins with the slot state machine.

tour.title: Inspect Slot Rules and Models
tour.description: Review the slot configuration and model/controller classes that define symbols, paylines, payouts, reels, player state, and win presentation.

tour.title: Review Shared UI Utilities
tour.description: Look at the reusable utility layer for animation sequencing, events, buttons, sound, GUI controls, and popup flows used across the slot scene.

tour.title: Map the Server-Authoritative Path
tour.description: Finish with the example backend and client integration path for authenticated sessions, spin requests, balance updates, RNG, win calculation, and database schema support.
